name: gitignore-template-drift
question: Does this project's .gitignore lack any framework-managed patterns from the current claude-template baseline?

schema.missing_patterns: array of string (verbatim baseline pattern lines absent from project .gitignore)
schema.project_patterns: integer (total non-comment, non-blank lines in project .gitignore)
schema.briefing: string (empty when drifted=false OR baseline missing; otherwise: 'gitignore-template-drift: N framework patterns missing — run /0-uldf-migrate-hygiene to update')

fallback: Read claude-template/.gitignore (or ~/.claude/.gitignore when deployed). Extract non-comment, non-blank lines under the '# Claude Code (session artifacts — never commit)' header (these are the framework-managed patterns). Read project .gitignore and compare line-trimmed exact matches; missing baseline lines are drift. When no drift: briefing line is empty/absent. When drift: 'gitignore-template-drift: N framework patterns missing — run /0-uldf-migrate-hygiene to update'.

baseline_resolution.graceful_absent: When no baseline found: drifted=false, briefing='', exit 0

project_resolution.graceful_absent: When project .gitignore missing: project_patterns=0, missing_patterns=all baseline, drifted=true

briefing_line_convention: Empty briefing string = suppress line (per ULDF gracefully-absent convention). Hook MUST NOT print 'No drift detected' fallback.

provenance.note: Companion to /0-uldf-migrate-hygiene (HYGIENE-02). Surfaces baseline drift in the session-start ORACLE BRIEFING so legacy projects (those that ran /0-uldf-setup-project before CSI Phase 1+1.5+1.6+HYGIENE-01) get nudged onto the post-CSI-1.6 baseline. Companion oracle pattern lineage: dispatchable-sessions (briefing line that surfaces actionable state).
